ham.subject: Transaction Alert: ₹5,000 debited from your account
ham.body:
Dear Customer,

A transaction of ₹5,000 was debited from your account ending 1234 on 15/04/2026 at 10:45 AM.
Transaction ID: 9876543210.

Yadi aapne yeh transaction nahi kiya, turant humse sampark karein.

Thank you,
XYZ Bank

spam.subject: Important: Income Tax Refund Pending – Verify Now
spam.body:
Dear Sir/Madam,

We are pleased to inform you that the Income Tax Department has identified a pending refund of ₹XX,XXX.00 for the financial year 2024-25. To process the refund, we require your bank account details for direct transfer. Kripya apni bank details verify karein at <URL> within 48 hours to avoid cancellation of the refund.

Yadi aap action nahi dete, refund forfeited ho jayega. For any queries, contact the Income Tax Helpline at 1800-XYZ-1234.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Regards,
Income Tax Department
